claims.claim: `semantic_friction_coefficient` needs directional interpretation so the bridge can distinguish obstructive resistance from productive traction.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `SemanticFrictionVectorV1` as a companion inside `ViscosityPorosityTransportReviewV1`, decomposing scalar friction into resistance, traction, productive-resistance score, direction, and evidence basis without changing inbound telemetry or control.

claims.claim: Viscosity needs dissipation/decay interpretation so sediment is not treated as simple accumulation.
claims.rationale: Existing `dissipation_factor`, `dynamic_fluidity_index`, `viscosity_persistence_delta`, `viscosity_decay_hint`, `transport_state`, and `sludge_risk` already distinguish navigable viscosity, transient thickening, and impassable sludge in read-only review logic.

claims.claim: Increase the weight of `viscosity_persistence_coefficient` in resonance calculation when `pressure_risk` exceeds 0.35.
claims.rationale: This would alter live resonance/pressure semantics rather than only read them. It is preserved as an explicit approval packet instead of being implemented hidden inside diagnostics.
